decisions_made.reason: Kept upfront cash at x100 for big deals, lowered monthly income to x20 to make game challenging. Rat Race assets are bundled into a Personal Trust Fund instead of being wiped.
Chose 'Financial Goals' as display name. Full name on Store: 'Financial Goals - Kiến Tạo Tương Lai'.
